title: Orchestrator Task Envelope
description: Structured envelope for orchestrator task messages on the GitHub-native message bus. Posted as JSON fenced blocks in run-issue comments.

run_id.description: Unique identifier for the orchestrator run.

goal.description: High-level orchestration goal passed to every agent in the run.

repo_scope.description: Subset of target repositories in scope for this run.

task_id.description: Unique task identifier within a run.

agent.description: Agent type responsible for executing this task.

state.description: Current task state in the orchestrator state machine.

attempt.description: Current attempt number. Maximum is controlled by max_attempts in orchestrator-policy.yml.

depends_on.description: Task IDs that must reach state=done before this task may be dispatched.

url.description: Download URL (GitHub Actions artifact or issue attachment).

artifacts.description: Artifacts produced or referenced by this task.

result.description: Task result (null until task transitions to done or failed).

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the last state transition.

run_issue_number.description: GitHub issue number of the run tracking issue.

mode.description: Execution mode. safe=human gate required before merges; aggressive=auto-merge allowed.
